case_title: JOHN LUTZ VS. ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**SEE SIGNATURE** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED DEC-10-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOHN LUTZ IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JON DE URIARTE (REGIONAL DIRECTOR). PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:JOHN MICHAEL BAUMGARDNER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUTZ, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LUTZ, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUTZ, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.
